arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich: How to watch, kick-off time and injury news
arts.sum: Aston Villa face Bayern Munich in their first Champions League home match this evening in a fixture replete with historical references. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: Gnabry fed up with gossip at Bayern: "A shame for us players"
arts.sum: Serge Gnabry is frustrated by the rumors swirling around Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa make U-turn on the future of player Chelsea tried to sign earlier this summer
arts.sum: Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran was heavily linked with a move away from the club during the summer transfer window. Chelsea were keen on signing the player but the Blues failed to get the deal across the line. According to Football Insider, the likes of West Ham United were keen on the player as well. […] The post Aston Villa make U-turn on the future of player Chelsea tried to sign earlier this summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal face strong EPL interest to land talented Bayern Munich ace
arts.sum: When some of the continent’s best young players come up for grabs, Arsenal have to make sure they’re in the conversation, and CaughtOffside sources have advanced that the Gunners have their eye on a super Bayern Munich ace. Of course, if a genuine talent becomes available, the best European teams will always be sniffing around […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal face strong EPL interest to land talented Bayern Munich ace appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Bayern's Serge Gnabry makes 'hot' Aston Villa point and lifts lid on failed West Brom loan move
arts.sum: Bayern Munich forward Serge Gnabry is expecting a "hot game" against Aston Villa on Wednesday night, knowing it's the club's first home match in Europe's elite club competition in over 40 years . "I think for sure as I was a young kid at Arsenal and I came here [West Midlands] and didn’t have much game time," Gnabry reflected.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: How Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany bolstered Kim Min-jae and Dayot Upamecano; Chelsea still vying for Victor Osimhen; Liverpool to make a move for Mykhaylo Mudryk; Cristiano Ronaldo knows clock is ticking on career; and MORE!
arts.sum: Following a shaky showing, reports had emerged — among a lot of criticism — that Vincent Kompany had taken the back of his sometimes maligned defensive duo of Kim Min-Jae and Dayot Upamecano. Bayern Munich stars Michael Olise, Jamal Musiala, and Harry Kane were all named to WhoScored.com’s Bundesliga Team of the Month:

arts.ttl: Unai Emery explains plan to stop Harry Kane and reveals what he's told his players before Bayern clash
arts.sum: "Playing in Europe, we are very happy to face Bayern Munich at home and hopefully we can enjoy tomorrow and hopefully compete to show our best tomorrow against them." "If Aston Villa was not playing since 1982 against Bayern Munich then it is not good news.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s season goals align with Vincent Kompany’s mindset
arts.sum: Kompany: Of course, at a club like Bayern, you have to win trophies. It’s happened only twice in the past 12 years and for someone like Vincent Kompany, he is well aware of the club’s lofty standards and referenced his “winning culture” back in Belgium.

arts.ttl: Back in England, Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany looking to spoil Aston Villa’s party
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany spent last season at the helm of Burnley in the Premier League, so he knows how much Aston Villa ’s return to Champions League means to the club. But I know the stadium, the team and the coach very well - so it’s important that we go into this game tomorrow with full courage.”

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Serge Gnabry thriving under Vincent Kompany ahead of Aston Villa showdown
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Serge Gnabry knows his squad will face a challenge from Aston Villa in the Champions League, but also feels as if Vincent Kompany has the Bavarians ready. Our game is very good right now, very dominant.
